enabled.description: Master switch for CI jobs in .github/workflows/ci.yml (test, web-e2e, terraform).

test.description: Turbo build, lint, type-check, Jest coverage, Vitest (Node matrix).

terraform.description: terraform fmt -check and terraform validate (dev stack).

enabled.description: When false, run npm run repo-features:apply to move .github/dependabot.yml aside so Dependabot does not run.

custom.description: Opaque bag for your own scripts or docs; Lattice tooling ignores unknown top-level keys except those defined here.
